title: A Distant Roar
lines: In the silence between the gusts of wind, you hear it—a low, rhythmic rumble that isn't human. It's coming from the Big Cat exhibit.
Your skin crawls as you realize the sound isn't just a growl; it's a wet, rattle-heavy snarl of something that should be dead.
The air feels thick with the metallic scent of old blood...

options.desc: 2. Step back toward the overgrown gate

title: Sticky Surfaces
lines: You reach out to touch the residue on the wall. It's thick, like half-dried sap, but it's warm. Too warm for a sewer.
A faint, rhythmic ripple moves through the sludge at your feet. Something below is breathing, and it's massive.
Your hand comes away covered in a translucent, foul-smelling slime that won't easily rub off.

options.desc: 1. Wipe the slime on your trousers and move on
2. Examine the slime under your flashlight
3. Search for a way toward the water

title: The Hum of the Hive
lines: The vibration in the air is constant here. It isn't just sound; it's a physical pressure on your chest.
As you stare into the dark vents, you see hundreds of tiny, glowing eyes. The wasps aren't just here; they've made this factory their palace.
You feel a sudden, sharp pain in your neck—a sensory warning from your lizard brain to get out now.

options.desc: 2. Try to track the movement in the vents
3. Peak inside a large, humming vat
